# Feature support for Vault Enterprise

@include 'alerts/enterprise-only.mdx'

Prior to 2026, HashiCorp offered Long-Term Support (LTS) for specific
Vault Enterprise releases. Starting with the April 2026 (2.x.x) release, Vault
Enterprise follows the IBM Support Cycle-2 (SC2) model.


## Vault versioning 

@include 'version-syntax.mdx'


## What is Support Cycle-2 (SC2)?

The Support Cycle 2 uses a "2 + 1 + 3" framework to determine coverage for usage
support and product updates:

- **2** years of base support.
- **1** year of critical [extended support](https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/node/7008589).
- **3** years of [sustained support](https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/node/7008619),
  which **does not** include new fixes or enhancements.

The table below outlines the expected product updates and technical support
coverage for each support phase.

Product update                | Base support | Extended support | Sustained support 
----------------------------- | ------------ | ---------------- | -----------------
New features                  | Yes          | No               | No 
Non-critical bug fixes        | Yes          | No               | No 
Product improvements          | Yes          | No               | No
Critical bug fixes            | Yes          | Yes              | No
Security patches              | Yes          | Limited          | No
Technical support case access | Yes          | Yes              | Yes

For additional details on technical support coverage, please contact your account
representative or refer to the support article on
[IBM article on Support Cycle-2 (SC2) coverage](https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/ibm-software-support-lifecycle-policies#Support_Cycle).


## Coverage for existing LTS versions

Existing long-term support versions follow the existing standard and extended
support periods. Standard maintenance for a given Vault version lasts
approximately 1 year. After the first year, LTS Vault versions move from
standard maintenance to extended maintenance for approximately one additional
year.

LTS version | GA        | Extended maintenance start | Extended maintence end
----------- | --------- | -------------------------- | ----------------------
1.16.x      |  APR 2024 | MAR 2025                   | APR 2026
1.19.x      |  MAR 2025 | APR 2026                   | APR 2027

Extended maintenance includes patches for bugs that may cause outages and
critical vulnerabilities and exposures (CVEs).

Refer to the
[IBM HashiCorp Self-Managed Product Support Lifecycle Addendum](https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/node/7258053)
support article or the
[HashiCorp Support FAQ](https://www.ibm.com/support/pages/node/7267028)
for more details.
